title: urostigma elasticum
intro: Urostigma elasticum, also known as the Indian rubber tree or Malabar rubber tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Moraceae. The medicinal properties of Urostigma elasticum lie in its sap, which contains a mixture of latex and mucilage, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Urostigma elasticum can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
